title: ferulago bracteata
intro: Ferulago bracteata is a plant species in the family Apiaceae, commonly known as a type of wild angelica or sweet cicely. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, respiratory infections, and menstrual disorders, due to its health benefits including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Ferulago bracteata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
